task_completion.description: Vital Recorder is open with the '0001.vital' file loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Vital Recorder application window is visible, and the title bar or loaded file indicator displays '0001.vital'.

task_completion.description: The Solar8000 / ART_MBP track is added to the display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waveform or parameter track labeled 'Solar8000 / ART_MBP' (or similar abbreviation for Mean Arterial Blood Pressure) is visible in the main display area.

task_completion.description: The Primus / ETCO2 track is added to the display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waveform or parameter track labeled 'Primus / ETCO2' (End-Tidal CO2) is visible in the main display area.

task_completion.description: The BIS / BIS track is added to the display.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A waveform or parameter track labeled 'BIS / BIS' (Bispectral Index) is visible in the main display area.

task_completion.description: The new tracks are displayed alongside the existing default tracks.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Other default waveform tracks are still visible in the display area alongside the three newly added tracks; they have not been replaced or deleted.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Vital Recorder GUI to add the tracks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vital Recorder interface, menus, or track selection dialogs being used, rather than terminal commands or scripts modifying the file.

integrity.description: The task was performed in the actual Vital Recorder application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window matches the standard Vital Recorder interface, not a text editor, image editor, or mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the track names into a text file or terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: The track names appear as actual UI elements/labels within the Vital Recorder waveform display, not as plain text in a terminal or notepad.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The active window title should indicate '0001.vital'. The three specific tracks to verify in the Vital Recorder display are 'Solar8000 / ART_MBP', 'Primus / ETCO2', and 'BIS / BIS'. These correspond to real parameters from VitalDB Case 0001.
